essence: Protects marine habitats and species through monitoring, enforcement, and restoration activities.

identity.title: Marine Conservation Officer
identity.summary: Conducts surveys, enforces marine protections, and works with stakeholders to manage coastal and offshore ecosystems.

salary.notes: Roles requiring boat handling or diving qualifications may attract higher pay.

qualifications: Experience in marine biology, ecology, or conservation
Survey skills and familiarity with marine legislation
Boat handling and safety qualifications desirable
Ability to work at sea and in coastal environments

lifestyle.description: Fieldwork at sea and on coasts; requires physical resilience and willingness to work in variable weather.

habits: Conducts marine species and habitat surveys
